form.formComment: Last start ran last of 13 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, 41 len behind Boguslu carrying 50kg at $50.30. form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; came from midfield and scored a big 4.5 len win at this track March 8 over 1200m defeating Belli Bey carrying 58kg at $1.70. Well-placed to keep the 100% record intact.
